title: Historical Council
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|Citizens of the New Republic must know their foundation in history. We have a rich and glorious tradition behind us, as well as a legacy of dark mistakes. We must learn from both.|New Republic Historical Council|<ref name="The Essential Chronology">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref>}}
The '''New Republic Historical Council''', later the '''Historical Council of the Galactic Federation of Free Alliances''', was an organization within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] in charge of historical research as well as measures and values.<ref name="The Essential Chronology" /><ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> It had research teams occupied with retrieving lost information on [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]], [[Toola/Legends|Toola]], [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] (presumably from the ''[[Chu'unthor]]''), the ruins of the [[Great Jedi Library/Legends|Great Jedi Library]] and [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]], the [[Imperial Information Center]], and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|Holocrons]] held by the [[New Jedi Order]].<ref name="The Essential Chronology" /> It was possibly related to the [[History Section]].<ref name="Dark Empire Sourcebook">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>

While under the New Republic, it was tasked with creating a [[The Essential Chronology|historical chronicle]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], which it released in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]];<ref name="The Essential Chronology" /> it later was tasked with producing a [[The New Essential Chronology (in-universe)|second edition]] of the document following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], which was published in [[36 ABY]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" />

The Historical Council also formally established and popularized using the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] as the zero point of the [[Galactic Standard Calendar|calendar]].<ref name="The Essential Chronology" /><ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> [[Tionne Solusar]]'s [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force|guide]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] followed this convention.<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>

[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]], formerly Director of [[New Republic Council Research]] and [[Assistant Historian]] to the Republic,<ref name="The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref> was [[Archivist emeritus]] of the Council.<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" />
